name: Wc - Decision Packet Telegram automatic cabled - TEMPLATE

parameters.content:
TEMPLATE ONLY — inactive, manual single execution, configure Telegram credential/chat_id in n8n UI only, no secrets in Git.

Wc automatic/cablato Decision Packet Telegram test.

Before running:
1) Import this template manually; keep INACTIVE
2) Configure credential **CONFIGURE_TELEGRAM_CREDENTIAL_IN_N8N_UI** (name: CONTROL PLANE - Telegram Bot)
3) Configure chat_id **CONFIGURE_CHAT_ID_IN_N8N_UI** in Telegram node only
4) Run Manual Trigger ONCE — expect one TEST ONLY Decision Packet message

This template: no workflow 40/41, no Data Table, no GitHub write, no PM-34, no Schedule/Webhook. Classifier output is sanitized test data only (no live classifier-server call in template).

parameters.jsCode:
// Sanitized classifier-style event/output for Wc Decision Packet Telegram test.
// See docs/runtime/test-events/wc-decision-packet-telegram-test-event.json
// No secrets, tokens, chat_id, credentials, webhooks, API keys, or chain-of-thought.
const payload = {
  event_id: 'evt-wc-decision-packet-test-001',
  source_repo: 'mrhz1973/control-plane',
  source_commit: 'abc1234-test-only',
  workflow_source: 'wc-template-test',
  decision_id: 'D-9999-T',
  kind: 'runtime',
  risk: 'medium',
  route: 'human_gate',
  confidence: 'high',
  requires_human: true,
  classifier_reason: 'runtime-adjacent Telegram Decision Packet test; human gate required',
  context: 'Wc template test: classifier-style output requires a supervised human gate before any automatic/cablato promotion.',
  why_decision_needed: 'Route human_gate with requires_human=true blocks silent auto-proceed; Telegram Decision Packet path must be validated once under supervision.',
  options: [
    '1 — Record template import only, no runtime promotion',
    '2 — Proceed to supervised manual single-send validation later',
    '3 — Stop and keep automatic/cablato Telegram NOT RUN'
  ],
  recommendation: 'Raccomandazione: 2 — validates the formatting/send path once, still manually supervised.',
  main_risk: 'Accidental promotion of test packet as operational; mitigated by TEST ONLY banner and inactive workflow.',
  micro_interactions_eliminated: 'Avoids manual copy of classifier fields and ad-hoc Telegram prose reconstruction.',
  requested_reply: 'Scrivi: 1 / 2 / 3',
  what_is_not_done: 'No workflow 40/41 mutation, no Data Table write, no GitHub write, no PM-34 unlock, no automated full chain, no operational deploy.'
};
return [{ json: payload }];

parameters.content:
PASS (future physical run): one Telegram message sent; message matches DECISION_PACKET_FORMAT.md; TEST ONLY banner present; 2-5 numbered options; Scrivi: 1 / 2 / 3; workflow stays INACTIVE.

BLOCKED if: workflow active unexpectedly; credential/chat_id missing; send fails; malformed message; secrets in output; workflow 40/41 touched; PM-34 touched; Data Table/GitHub write.

After run: collect sanitized message text, use docs/runtime/WC_DECISION_PACKET_TELEGRAM_REGISTRATION_PROMPT.md.
